verification.note: Section 64(1A)/10(32) and the Rs 1,500 per-child cap are long-standing, unchanged provisions. Checked against Income Tax Department case law text and multiple current filing guides; re-check only if a Budget/Finance Act amendment is reported.

source_refs: Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 64(1A) (clubbing of minor's income)
Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 10(32) (per-child exemption on the clubbed amount)

excluded_from_clubbing: income from the minor's own manual work
income from the minor's own skill, talent, or specialized knowledge
income of a minor with a Section 80U disability
